Main - Technology - Differences

SP!RES: A technology that has no analogues in the world

We don't just repair pipes - we have created a new standard for sanitation of sewage systems. SP!RES is the result of many years of engineering development, a patented system that allows you to solve problems that are inaccessible to traditional methods and competitive technologies.

Remote sanitation

repairs at a distance of tens of meters from the entry point

Lack of excavation

no dismantling, restoration of landscaping and approvals

Legally relevant reporting

automatic PDF report with process parameters

Economic efficiency

payback period from 1.5 to 6 months

All-season

work at any time of the year, regardless of the direction of flow

[ Technology 1 ]

Intelligent control system with the exclusion of the human factor

SP!RES is equipped with a built-in control computer that fully controls the sanitation process in real time. Three sensors continuously monitor pressure, temperature, and time intervals. The system automatically performs the inversion and polymerization process, eliminating operator errors and ensuring perfect results.

  • without excavation
  • without large financial investments
  • without restoration of landscaping
  • without access to private property

[ Technology 2 ]

Creating a new pipe inside the old one by pressure inversion method

Unlike standard broaching methods, SP!RES uses inversion technology: the liner is turned out under pressure directly inside the repaired area. A special calibration sleeve presses the material against the walls of the pipe, ensuring a tight fit and the formation of a perfectly smooth inner layer without wrinkles and gaps.

  • without excavation
  • without large financial investments
  • without restoration of landscaping
  • without access to private property

[ Technology 3 ]

Rehabilitation of house and private connections without access to the property

The main difference between SP!RES is the ability to repair branches and horizontal sections at a considerable distance from the main highway. You don't need to enter a private area, negotiate with residents, or open floors in basements. All work is carried out remotely through existing inspection wells.

  • without excavation
  • without large financial investments
  • without restoration of landscaping
  • without access to private property

[ Technology 4 ]

Automatic technical report with evidence base

At the end of the work, SP!RES generates a detailed PDF report that includes all the actual process parameters: pressure graphs, temperatures, timestamps. This document has full legal force and can be provided to the customer, regulatory authorities, management companies and insurance companies. Generation in different languages is available.

  • without excavation
  • without large financial investments
  • without restoration of landscaping
  • without access to private property
